notes: Solid snake implementation with smooth controls, speed scaling, victory state, and nice visual touches like rounded segments and directional eyes; minor issue is GAMEOVER overlay says 'Press R to play again' but R only works in PAUSED state, not GAMEOVER.
Solid core gameplay and great visuals, but marred by a UI/input mismatch (tells player to press 'R' to restart, but only Space/Enter work) and unreachable code.
Core snake gameplay and presentation are solid, but restart prompts are misleading because R does not work on game over/victory and that control-flow issue meaningfully hurts usability.
